DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B GDP) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). 농업 GDP의 14% GDP (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. ...할 때 production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). ...할 때 solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 gas-fired power generation breaks.
이행하다 유전별 배출 disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes 환경 damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
파괴 불가능 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive 내부고발자 protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent 경제 ($124.7B GDP) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). 농업 GDP의 9.5% GDP (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the 중복 이익. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: 이행하다 the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. ...할 때 democratic decisions override extraction interests, the 중복 이익 breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block 환경 impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's 환경 data (Amazon 삼림 벌채, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
파괴 불가능 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest 환경 lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for 환경 governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital 경제 ($43.1B GDP) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% GDP). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ 배출.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. ...할 때 carbon pricing fully applies, the 중복 이익 between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. ...할 때 subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory 발전소별 lifecycle 배출 and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed 환경 monitoring makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's 환경 enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees 환경 policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the 국영 energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.
Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's 에너지 규제기관. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant 배출 reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab 경제 by population ($389.1B GDP). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). 농업 GDP의 13.7% GDP. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for 배출 투명성. Per-field 배출 disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. ...할 때 solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 gas-for-domestic-power 약화된다.
이행하다 유전별 배출 disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle 배출 visible per unit of production makes W computable.
파괴 불가능 by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on 시민 사회 and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for 재생에너지 development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B GDP). Agriculture dominates (34.8% GDP, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of 삼림 벌채 (fr=5.6% GDP equivalent in forest rents). ...할 때 per-farm 환경 data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include 환경 conditionality. ...할 때 agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 clearing forest for short-term cultivation 약화된다.
Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and 토양 황폐화 published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce 시스템 의존성.

Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's 환경 당국. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on 개발하다ment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic 경제 ($298.7B GDP) with strong forestry sector. 서비스업 GDP의 62.2% GDP, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% GDP). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). EU 회원국 with robust 환경 regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. ...할 때 per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. ...할 때 subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 plantation monoculture 약화된다.

Mandatory per-harvest 환경 data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce 시스템 의존성.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African 경제 ($20.9B GDP) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the 중복 이익 between operators and government revenue 약화된다. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks ...에 대한 중복 이익이 extraction.
이행하다 유전별 배출 disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making 환경 costs visible makes W computable.
파괴 불가능 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus 경제 ($34.2B GDP) with 광업 sector (1.28% GDP, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% GDP). EU 후보국 country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese 광업 (Chiatura) and copper 광업 generate significant water pollution. EU accession 환경 alignment will require improved monitoring. ...할 때 water quality data is linked to 광업 output, W가 계산 가능해진다.

Mandatory 광산별 water quality and 배출 disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce 시스템 의존성.

GH.s: West African 경제 ($82.3B GDP) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold 광업 (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold 광업 (galamsey) is a major 환경 crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal 광업) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. ...할 때 광산별 water quality data is published and linked to gold production, W가 계산 가능해진다. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal 광업 with 환경 standards and alternative livelihood programs. ...할 때 legal small-scale 광업 provides comparable income with less 환경 damage, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 illegal extraction 약화된다.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to 광업 areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal 광업 with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce 시스템 의존성.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential 민주주의 with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold 광업.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African 경제 ($25B GDP) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). 농업 GDP의 31% GDP. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite 광업 displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making 광산별 환경 data visible breaks system independence.

Per-mine 환경 and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. ...할 때 downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W가 계산 가능해진다.

GR.s: EU 경제 ($256.2B GDP) with dominant services sector (68% GDP, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). 농업 GDP의 3.8% GDP (olives, wine).

PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with 환경 defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable 팜유) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing 경제 globally ($24.7B GDP, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). 석유 지대 at 22.08%, 광업 at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). ...할 때 the full fiscal terms and 환경 costs are disclosed and understood, W가 계산 가능해진다 from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. ...할 때 Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), ...에 대한 중복 이익이 an extractive-favorable contract 약화된다.
Mandatory 유전별 배출 disclosure and 환경 monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global 배출 — extending to 유전별 Guyana data makes W computable.
파괴 불가능 by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for 환경 permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style 의회 민주주의. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B GDP) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. ...할 때 Scope 3 financed 배출 are disclosed per financial institution, W가 계산 가능해진다 from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed 배출 disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. ...할 때 banks must disclose the 배출 their lending supports, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 fossil fuel financing 약화된다 — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.

HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income 경제 ($37.1B GDP) with agriculture at 11.2% GDP (coffee, palm oil, bananas). 제조업 GDP의 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

Satellite-based 삼림 벌채 monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce 시스템 의존성.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B GDP) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. 농업 GDP의 15.9% GDP (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme 삼림 벌채 (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. 제조업 GDP의 26.2% GDP (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total 삼림 벌채 (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The 시스템 의존성 is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of 삼림 벌채-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: 개혁하다 agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. ...할 때 hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 continued 삼림 벌채 breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.
Extreme 시스템 의존성 — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing 시스템 의존성.

Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: EU 회원국 ($222.7B GDP) with strong manufacturing (15.8% GDP, automotive-focused). 서비스업 GDP의 59.5% GDP. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). 농업 GDP의 2.7% GDP. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 경제 ($1,396.3B GDP). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% GDP). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and 광업 (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic 삼림 벌채.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-삼림 벌채 traceability to plantation level. ...할 때 발전소별ation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W가 계산 가능해진다 from commodity prices.

부분적으로 파괴 가능. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable 팜유) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential 민주주의 and the world's third-largest 민주주의.

IE.s: High-income EU 경제 ($609.2B GDP, inflated by multinational profit booking). 제조업 GDP의 29.6% GDP (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. 농업 GDP의 1% GDP but intensive dairy farming with significant methane 배출. 서비스업 GDP의 60.6% GDP.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane 배출 by 20%+. ...할 때 per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W가 계산 가능해진다 from agricultural production data.
bp: 개혁하다 CAP subsidies from production-linked to 환경 outcome-linked. ...할 때 dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 herd growth 약화된다.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon 개발하다ment Act (2021) sets legally binding 배출 budgets.

IL.s: High-tech 경제 ($540.4B GDP) with dominant services (72.5% GDP). High military expenditure (8.78% GDP). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field 배출 disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net 배출 benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. ...할 때 renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the 중복 이익 약화된다.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent 경제 ($279.6B GDP) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).

Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking 유전별 flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for 환경 regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for 환경 policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a 의회 민주주의 but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B GDP) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international 제재. 제조업 GDP의 20.6% GDP. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International 제재 have already weakened the 중복 이익 by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. ...할 때 제재 enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. ...할 때 Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for 재생에너지 investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The 중복 이익 in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field 환경 data is largely unavailable due to 제재-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
파괴 불가능. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for 재생에너지 development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced 경제 ($33.3B GDP) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). 수산업 are 5% of GDP and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. ...할 때 ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. ...할 때 quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 maximum extraction 약화된다.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and 수산업 — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B GDP) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower 투명성 than UK mainland. ...할 때 beneficial ownership data and tax 투명성 information are published, W가 계산 가능해진다 from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership 투명성 aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. ...할 때 financial secrecy is eliminated, the 중복 이익 between service providers and opacity-seeking clients 약화된다.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.

Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island 경제 ($22B GDP) with tourism and services dominant (60% GDP). 농업 GDP의 8% GDP. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. ...할 때 soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. ...할 때 farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the 중복 이익 breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects 환경 data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style 의회 민주주의.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern 경제 ($53.4B GDP) with limited natural resources. 서비스업 GDP의 60.4% GDP. High military expenditure (4.8% GDP). 제조업 GDP의 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash 광업 (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. ...할 때 환경 cost data is published alongside 광업 revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Internalize 환경 costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into 광업 operations through 환경 levies. ...할 때 miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 water-intensive extraction 약화된다.
Publish 광산별 water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to 광업 output makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees 광업 policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the 광업 regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a 입헌군주제 with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest 경제 ($120.3B GDP) with agriculture at 22.5% GDP (tea, coffee, horticulture). 서비스업 GDP의 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. ...할 때 per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: 개혁하다 agricultural export incentives to require 환경 certification. ...할 때 tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 intensive monoculture 약화된다.
Farm-level 환경 data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce 시스템 의존성.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, 수산업 and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong 환경 protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous 경제 ($17.5B GDP) dominated by gold 광업 (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of GDP, min=11.15%). 농업 GDP의 8.6% GDP. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary 민주주의 (rare in Central Asia).

bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all 광업. ...할 때 remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making 환경 costs visible makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income 경제 ($46.4B GDP) with garment manufacturing (27.8% GDP) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta 삼림 벌채 ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes 삼림 벌채 computable.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has 환경 certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and 수산업 — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B GDP) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a 입헌군주제 with genuine (if limited) 의회 debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest 경제 ($291.5B GDP) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian 환경 cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian 경제 ($16.5B GDP) with agriculture at 16.8% GDP and 광업 at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

LB.s: Collapsed 경제 ($20.1B GDP, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the 중복 이익 has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. ...할 때 accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the 중복 이익 between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능 — the crisis has already revealed 시스템 의존성. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

LK.s: Island 경제 ($99B GDP) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. 농업 GDP의 8.3% GDP (tea, rubber, coconut). 제조업 GDP의 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural 시스템 의존성 works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.

Per-estate 환경 data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of 시스템 의존성 (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B GDP) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. ...할 때 oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), ...에 대한 중복 이익이 capturing oil infrastructure 약화된다.
NOC 유전별 production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to 환경 data makes W computable.

를 통해 옹호: OAS for governance reform
을 추진: 광업 company home-country oversight
i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — 환경 당국. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly 권위주의. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — 광업 regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian 경제 ($42.9B GDP). 농업 GDP의 21.9% GDP. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of GDP. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. ...할 때 per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. ...할 때 hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unsustainable cultivation 약화된다.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: DoE (Department of Environment)
Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs
Hydropower companies: 에 투자하다 watershed protection upstream of reservoirs
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture): 개혁하다 subsidy structure toward soil conservation
MOFE: 강화하다 watershed management
DSCWM (Dept of Soil Conservation and Watershed Management): Scale programs
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: member of the Pratinidhi Sabha (House of Representatives, 275 members) 을 요구하기 위해 hillside agriculture conservation programs
Support climate adaptation finance for Nepal's agricultural sector
를 통해 옹호: SAARC for regional watershed management
을 추진: GLOF (glacial lake outburst flood) early warning and prevention investment
i: DoE — 환경 당국 under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock 개발하다ment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced 경제 ($260.2B GDP) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. 농업 GDP의 4.4% GDP but outsized 환경 footprint (dairy is largest export sector). 서비스업 GDP의 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). ...할 때 per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 이행하다 the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. ...할 때 farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 herd expansion 약화된다.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: 에 보고: regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: 채택하다 binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
이행하다 methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: 집행하다 NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): 개혁하다 farm support toward 환경 outcomes
EPA: 강화하다 agricultural chemical regulation
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (120 members) 을 요구하기 위해 enforcement of freshwater bottom lines
Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural 배출 (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) 환경 provisions
을 추진: inclusion of biological methane in national 배출 reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary 환경 regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national 환경 policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong 내부고발자 protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve 환경 bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf 경제 ($107.1B GDP) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum 개발하다ment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. ...할 때 hydrogen revenue streams are established, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 oil dependence 약화된다.
Per-field 배출 disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: 에 보고: Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate 재생에너지 integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): 개발하다 green hydrogen export capacity
이행하다 TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: 강화하다 환경 standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
를 통해 옹호: GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
을 추진: Oman Vision 2040 환경 targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's 환경 regulator. PDO (Petroleum 개발하다ment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing 의회 activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant 경제 ($86.5B GDP) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). 서비스업 GDP의 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá 광업 contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The 중복 이익 between the 광업 company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of 광업 contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the 중복 이익 through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing 시스템 의존성.
a: Report 환경 violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and 환경 remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive 환경 remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit 광업 revenue management
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) 을 요구하기 위해 comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign 환경 decisions
을 추진: ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on 환경 sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — 환경 당국. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the 광업 contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees 광업 concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich 경제 ($289.2B GDP) with 광업 at 12.1% GDP (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). 농업 GDP의 7.3%. 서비스업 GDP의 51.3%. Social conflicts around 광업 are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's 광업 sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). ...할 때 환경 monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. ...할 때 indigenous communities can effectively negotiate 환경 conditions, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 extraction without consent 약화된다.
Mandatory 광산별 환경 monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's 광업 환경 standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: 에 보고: OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through 광업 company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: 이행하다 community development agreements
채택하다 international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish 광산별 환경 data
OEFA: Increase 환경 monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: 강화하다 환경 conditions in 광업 concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): 집행하다 water quality standards downstream of mines
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) 을 요구하기 위해 enforcement of consulta previa and 환경 monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
을 추진: EITI enhanced reporting with 환경 data
i: OEFA — Peru's 환경 enforcement agency for the 광업 sector, conducting inspections and imposing 제재. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts 환경 impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and 광업 ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island 경제 ($31.8B GDP). Mining at 14.41% GDP, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). 농업 GDP의 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's 광업 sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic 환경 damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory 환경 bonds per IFC Performance Standards. ...할 때 remediation is pre-funded, 중복 이익 in low-cost disposal 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: 이행하다 international 환경 standards
Address legacy contamination
채택하다 EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): 강화하다 환경 conditions in 광업 leases
CEPA: 집행하다 환경 standards
EITI PNG: Expand to 환경 data
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: member of the National Parliament (111 members) 을 요구하기 위해 환경 bonds for all 광업 operations
Support customary landowner rights in 광업 negotiations
를 통해 옹호: Pacific Islands Forum for regional 환경 standards
을 추진: international accountability for 광업 legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's 환경 당국. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — 광업 regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the 광업 regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a 입헌군주제 (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style 의회 민주주의.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian 경제 ($461.6B GDP). 서비스업 GDP의 63.2% GDP. 농업 GDP의 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). 제조업 GDP의 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel 광업 (for EV batteries) generates significant 환경 damage on small islands. ...할 때 광산별 환경 data is linked to nickel exports, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for 광업 permits. President Duterte's 2017 광업 audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks ...에 대한 중복 이익이 non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: 에 보고: DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through 시민 사회 organizations
에 보고: Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: 이행하다 international 환경 standards
채택하다 responsible 광업 certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: 강화하다 환경 monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require 환경 bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): 집행하다 pollution standards
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator 을 요구하기 위해 enforcement of 광업 환경 standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced 환경 protections
를 통해 옹호: ASEAN for regional 광업 standards
을 추진: EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages 광업 regulation. Philippines has relatively active 시민 사회 and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs 광업 operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential 민주주의.

PK.s: Large 경제 ($371.6B GDP) with agriculture at 23.7% GDP (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). 제조업 GDP의 13.2%. 서비스업 GDP의 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. ...할 때 per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. ...할 때 farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 water-intensive monoculture 약화된다.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power 개발하다ment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: 개발하다 water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
에 투자하다 drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: 개혁하다 water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): 집행하다 provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator 을 요구하기 위해 agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
을 추진: international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal 환경 당국. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own 환경 agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal 의회 민주주의.

PL.s: Major EU 경제 ($917.8B GDP) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). 제조업 GDP의 16.1% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. ...할 때 full carbon costs are internalized, the 중복 이익 between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The 중복 이익 breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant 배출 and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: 에 보고: GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in 광업 regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish 내부고발자 law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: 개발하다 coal phase-out plans with worker transition
에 투자하다 offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
채택하다 per-unit 배출 reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): 개혁하다 tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: 이행하다 National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat 을 요구하기 위해 accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
을 추진: territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief 환경 inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.
PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal 광업 company (국영, ~40,000 employees).
URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the 에너지 규제기관. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the 환경 fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with 광업 unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B GDP) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of GDP — among world's highest pharma concentration). 서비스업 GDP의 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). ...할 때 diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. ...할 때 imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 high-margin processed imports 약화된다.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: 에 보고: FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal 내부고발자 protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
채택하다 voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: 이행하다 nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
을 추진: local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal 내부고발자 protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B GDP, severely constrained by occupation). 농업 GDP의 7.4% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). ...할 때 water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. ...할 때 Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 restricting agricultural development 약화된다.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme 시스템 의존성. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
에 보고: international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
에 투자하다 water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document 환경 impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
를 통해 옹호: UN for equitable water allocation
