Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian 환경 당국. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU 경제 ($313.3B GDP). 서비스업 GDP의 66.3% GDP. 농업 GDP의 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). 제조업 GDP의 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: 이행하다 EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
Not fully breakable. 개혁하다ulation mandates reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese 내부고발자 law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: 개혁하다ulate products
채택하다 front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): 이행하다 labelling
ASAE: 집행하다 marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) 을 요구하기 위해 health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's 내부고발자 protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a 의회 민주주의.

PY.s: Landlocked South American 경제 ($44.5B GDP). 농업 GDP의 10.7% GDP (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). 제조업 GDP의 19% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe 삼림 벌채 from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco 삼림 벌채. ...할 때 per-farm 삼림 벌채 and 토양 황폐화 data is linked to soy exports, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-삼림 벌채 soy. ...할 때 EU buyers require verified 삼림 벌채-free origin, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based 삼림 벌채 monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce 토양 황폐화.
a: Report illegal 삼림 벌채 to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): 이행하다 zero-삼림 벌채 soy sourcing for Paraguay
채택하다 Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
에 투자하다 yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: 집행하다 the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate 환경 standards into soy export certification
INFONA: 강화하다 forest monitoring and enforcement
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional 을 요구하기 위해 extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur 환경 provisions enforcement
을 추진: indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where 삼림 벌채 continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated 경제 ($219.2B GDP). 산업 GDP의 58.2% GDP. 석유 지대 15.28% GDP, gas rents 12.01% GDP — world's largest LNG exporter. 서비스업 GDP의 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ 배출 globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. ...할 때 importers reduce LNG dependence, the 중복 이익 약화된다.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 fossil gas dependence 약화된다.
Per-field 배출 and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle 배출.
a: 에 보고: QatarEnergy HSE division
를 통해 문서화: international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
에 보고: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
에 투자하다 blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: 집행하다 air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate 배출 reduction targets
를 통해 옹호: GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional 배출 standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
을 추진: LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on 배출 intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — 국영, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — 환경 regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: EU 회원국 경제 ($382.6B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 13.2% GDP. 가스 지대 0.53%, oil 0.38%. 서비스업 GDP의 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite EU 회원국ship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. ...할 때 soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. ...할 때 subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 exhaustive monoculture 약화된다.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
에 보고: Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
를 통해 문서화: Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: 이행하다 EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): 채택하다 certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: 채택하다 soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: 강화하다 Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) 을 요구하기 위해 Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
를 통해 옹호: European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian 환경 NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — 환경 protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). EU 회원국 since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan 경제 ($90.1B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 12.7%. 석탄 지대 0.24% GDP — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. EU 후보국 country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant 배출 and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: 에 보고: Ministry of Environmental Protection
를 통해 문서화: CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable 개발하다ment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): 개발하다 lignite phase-out roadmap
에 투자하다 solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara 광업 basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): 개혁하다 tariffs to reflect 환경 costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: 채택하다 Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: 집행하다 compliance
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) 을 요구하기 위해 a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession 환경 chapter benchmarks
를 통해 옹호: Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
을 추진: EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — 환경 당국. CEKOR — Serbian 환경 NGO. RES Foundation — 재생에너지 advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara 광업 basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — 에너지 규제기관. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. EU 후보국 country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon 경제 ($2,173.8B GDP). 석유 지대 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, 광업 2.05% GDP. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. 군사비 7.05% GDP. Authoritarian governance under international 제재 since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western 제재 and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the 중복 이익.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. ...할 때 importers eliminate dependence, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced 투명성 — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
파괴 불가능. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to 제재 enforcement authorities
를 통해 문서화: investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: 집행하다 제재 compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: 강화하다 enforcement against evasion
EU: Close 제재 loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international 제재 on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
을 추진: addressing Russia's shadow fleet 환경 risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic 시민 사회 is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian 환경 issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU 제재 packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — 제재 enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international 제재 coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African 경제 ($14.3B GDP). 농업 GDP의 24.6% GDP. 산림 지대 3.97%. 서비스업 GDP의 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but 권위주의 governance. Strong 환경 policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and 토양 황폐화. ...할 때 soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the 중복 이익.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
를 통해 문서화: RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources 개발하다ment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: 채택하다 terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export 개발하다ment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: 집행하다 hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available 의회 channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes 환경 cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union 환경 governance frameworks
i: REMA — the 환경 management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes 환경 sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected 경제 ($49.7B GDP). 농업 GDP의 22.2% GDP. Mining 6.63% (gold). 석유 지대 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold 광업 uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. ...할 때 gold revenue flows are traced, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. ...할 때 refiners verify provenance, the 중복 이익 between armed groups and gold revenues 약화된다.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Artisanal 광업 uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
를 통해 문서화: INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: 이행하다 enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International 제재 bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council 제재 on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
을 추진: UAE cooperation on gold trade 투명성
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal 광업
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors 제재 and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal 광업 and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on 개발하다ment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic 경제 ($603.7B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 13% GDP. Mining 1% GDP (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). 서비스업 GDP의 66.4%. Strong 환경 regulations. EU 회원국. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore 광업 (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. ...할 때 광산별 환경 and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and 환경 remediation. ...할 때 LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 low-cost extraction 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

부분적으로 파괴 가능. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that 광업's downstream 시스템 의존성 on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: 에 보고: Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
에 보고: Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
를 통해 문서화: Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: 이행하다 enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: 강화하다 환경 conditions in 광업 permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous 환경 review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into 광업 assessments
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) 을 요구하기 위해 indigenous consent requirements in 광업 permits
를 통해 옹호: EU Critical Raw Materials Act for 환경 and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
을 추진: EU taxonomy alignment of 광업 환경 standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — 환경 protection agency. Bergsstaten — the 광업 inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.
LKAB — 국영 iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals 광업 and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized 환경 courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs 광업 permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a 입헌군주제 and EU 회원국.

SG.s: Advanced city-state 경제 ($547.4B GDP). 서비스업 GDP의 73% GDP. 제조업 GDP의 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' ...할 때 refinery 배출 and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's 탄소세 rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). ...할 때 refining margins incorporate carbon costs, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unpriced 배출 약화된다.
Per-refinery 배출 and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce 시스템 의존성 over time.
a: 에 보고: NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS 내부고발자 channels for financial misconduct
를 통해 문서화: SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): 이행하다 carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: 에 투자하다 green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate 탄소세 escalation timeline
MAS: 강화하다 climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate 재생에너지 targets
Engage through available 의회 channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN 환경 cooperation frameworks
를 통해 옹호: Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
을 추진: IMO shipping 배출 standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — 환경 regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — 에너지 규제기관. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a 의회 republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small EU 회원국 경제 ($73B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 19.4% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). EU 회원국 since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong 환경 awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. ...할 때 soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. ...할 때 subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 exhaustive monoculture 약화된다.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural 개발하다ment). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.

부분적으로 파괴 가능. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
를 통해 옹호: Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable 개발하다ment. Focus — 환경 NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. EU 회원국 since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European EU 회원국 ($140.9B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 16.3% GDP — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). 서비스업 GDP의 60%. EU 회원국 since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. ...할 때 per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). ...할 때 consumers can identify ultra-processing, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque ingredient lists 약화된다.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets

i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural 개발하다ment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. EU 회원국 since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African 경제 ($32.8B GDP). 농업 GDP의 16.6% GDP. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). 수산업 crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe 남획 by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. ...할 때 per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: 개혁하다 fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. ...할 때 EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 남획 약화된다.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)

CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional 수산업 Commission): Coordinate regional management

Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans

i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of 수산업 and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B GDP). Limited economic data available. 산림 지대 11.24% GDP (charcoal — major 삼림 벌채 driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. ...할 때 charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to 삼림 벌채 data, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). ...할 때 the ban is effectively enforced, the 중복 이익 between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade 약화된다.
Satellite 삼림 벌채 monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: 에 보고: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
를 통해 문서화: Somali 환경 organizations where operational

Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute 환경 programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors 제재 including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN 제재 framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American 경제 ($35.4B GDP). 서비스업 GDP의 61% GDP. 농업 GDP의 4.4%. 제조업 GDP의 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of GDP). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. ...할 때 CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. ...할 때 sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unregulated pesticide/herbicide use 약화된다.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)

i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — 환경 regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated 경제 ($23.6B GDP). 농업 GDP의 43.1% GDP — unusually high due to industrial collapse. 석유 지대 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). ...할 때 oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. ...할 때 reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque extraction 약화된다.
Oil revenue flow 투명성 as condition of reconstruction assistance and 제재 relief. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in 환경 standards.

Document 환경 damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction

i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian 경제 ($19.5B GDP). 석유 지대 16.75% GDP. 농업 GDP의 37.7%. 산림 지대 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue 투명성 mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. ...할 때 oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Restore oil revenue 투명성 mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.

i: Note: Chad's 시민 사회 space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue 투명성 coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African 경제 ($10.7B GDP). 농업 GDP의 21.3% GDP. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). 서비스업 GDP의 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate 광업 (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. ...할 때 광산별 환경 data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. ...할 때 export markets require cadmium limits, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unprocessed phosphate extraction 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.

ITIE-Togo: Expand to 환경 data disclosure
Engage through available 의회 channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS 환경 governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
을 추진: EITI full membership with 환경 disclosure
i: ANGE — national 환경 management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — 광업 oversight. ANGE — 환경 assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to 의회 system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian 경제 ($526.5B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 24.3% GDP (automotive, electronics, food processing). 농업 GDP의 8.7%. 서비스업 GDP의 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). ...할 때 per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators 약화된다 ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.

Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
를 통해 옹호: WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
을 추진: Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.
รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a 입헌군주제. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian 경제 ($14.2B GDP). Mining 7.09% GDP (gold, silver, antimony). 농업 GDP의 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of GDP from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's 광업 sector includes artisanal gold 광업 with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). ...할 때 per-facility 배출 and 환경 data are published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. ...할 때 aluminum and gold buyers require 환경 compliance verification, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unregulated production 약화된다.
Per-facility 환경 monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride 배출 and gold 광업 mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. TALCO smelter 배출 can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
를 통해 문서화: Central Asian 환경 networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)

Support EITI candidacy advancement with 환경 disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for 환경 reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik 광업.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold 광업 includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — 환경 regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.
Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively 일당 국가 (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed 경제 ($51.4B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 18% GDP. One of the world's most 권위주의 states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. ...할 때 methane data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다 despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. ...할 때 buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unmonitored gas production 약화된다.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다 without government cooperation.
파괴 불가능. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic 시민 사회 exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
를 통해 문서화: Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle 배출
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
를 통해 옹호: UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
을 추진: methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent 시민 사회, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting 환경 issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an 권위주의 state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African 경제 ($51.3B GDP). 농업 GDP의 9.7% GDP. 석유 지대 1.55%. 제조업 GDP의 14.8%. 서비스업 GDP의 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack 투명성. ...할 때 유전별 환경 and revenue data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue 투명성. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to GDP but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque revenue management.
Per-field 환경 monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: 에 보고: ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
를 통해 문서화: Tunisian 환경 organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): 채택하다 revenue 투명성 standards
에 투자하다 solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: 이행하다 hydrocarbon revenue 투명성
ANPE: 강화하다 환경 monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate 재생에너지 targets
Engage through available 의회 channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
를 통해 옹호: Union for the Mediterranean for 재생에너지 investment
을 추진: EITI membership as governance 투명성 measure
i: ANPE — 환경 protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on 환경 justice. Tunisia has relatively active 시민 사회 despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and 재생에너지 agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income 경제 ($1,359.1B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 16.8% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. 농업 GDP의 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. ...할 때 coal plant health costs are internalized, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. ...할 때 coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant 배출 and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: 에 보고: ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
를 통해 문서화: TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): 개발하다 coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: 에 투자하다 renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): 개혁하다 tariffs to reflect 환경 costs
ÇŞB: 이행하다 emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support 재생에너지 investment framework
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) 을 요구하기 위해 coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
를 통해 옹호: G20 for coal phase-out commitments
을 추진: EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework 환경 standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish 환경 NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy 경제 ($25.6B GDP). 가스 지대 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% GDP. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). 제조업 GDP의 14.4%. 서비스업 GDP의 59.2%. Parliamentary 민주주의.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 fossil fuel dependence 약화된다 naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. ...할 때 production costs rise on mature fields, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 fossil fuel dependence 약화된다 as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility 배출 and 환경 monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: 에 보고: EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
에 보고: MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
를 통해 문서화: Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (환경 NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): 개발하다 gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: 이행하다 carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process 배출
EMA: 강화하다 air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: 개발하다 재생에너지 framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): 개혁하다 energy pricing
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) 을 요구하기 위해 economic diversification and 재생에너지 policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
를 통해 옹호: Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
을 추진: IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active 환경 NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary 민주주의 with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African 경제 ($78.8B GDP). 농업 GDP의 23.3% GDP. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). 산림 지대 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). 서비스업 GDP의 29.6%. Growing 경제 with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold 광업 (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). ...할 때 광산별 환경 data is published alongside revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and 투명성 requirements. ...할 때 enforced alongside 환경 monitoring, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 opaque extraction 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mercury-free artisanal 광업 and improved tailings management reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
에 보고: Mining Commission
를 통해 문서화: LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): 이행하다 international 환경 standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): 채택하다 enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish 환경 and community impact data
Mining Commission: 집행하다 환경 conditions in 광업 licenses
NEMC: 강화하다 환경 impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include 환경 data
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) 을 요구하기 위해 환경 enforcement in 광업
Support EITI enhanced reporting with 환경 data
를 통해 옹호: EAC for regional 광업 환경 standards
을 추진: Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal 광업
i: NEMC — 환경 당국. Mining Commission — 광업 sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian 환경 law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue 투명성 advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government 광업 entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected 경제 ($190.7B GDP). Mining 5.32% GDP. 군사비 34.48% GDP (wartime). 농업 GDP의 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. EU 후보국 country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive 환경 damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's 광업 sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive 환경 damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent 환경 standards. ...할 때 reconstruction 환경 data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring 환경 standards in post-war reconstruction. ...할 때 reconstruction adheres to EU 환경 acquis, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 rapid but dirty rebuilding 약화된다.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: 에 보고: Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
를 통해 문서화: OSCE 환경 monitoring
Report war-related 환경 damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): 이행하다 EU-aligned 환경 standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global 환경 standards
Reconstruction companies: 채택하다 green building and 환경 remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: 집행하다 환경 standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: 개혁하다 광업 licensing with 환경 conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support 환경 governance capacity building
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) 을 요구하기 위해 환경 standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference 환경 commitments
를 통해 옹호: EU accession process for 환경 chapter prioritization
을 추진: international 환경 damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related 환경 destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related 환경 damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and 광업 group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — 광업 licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires 환경 acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. EU 후보국 country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (환경 damage documentation).

UG.s: East African 경제 ($53.9B GDP). 농업 GDP의 24.6% GDP. 산림 지대 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. ...할 때 project-level 환경 data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. ...할 때 banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unscrutinized pipeline construction 약화된다. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project 환경 impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create 환경 risk.
a: 에 보고: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
를 통해 문서화: international 환경 organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: 이행하다 comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: 채택하다 international 환경 standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): 집행하다 환경 conditions in production licenses
NEMA: 강화하다 환경 monitoring of oil projects
