Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
를 통해 옹호: European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
을 추진: EITI membership with 환경 disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary 환경 issues
i: NEMA — 환경 당국. Note: Ugandan 환경 activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American 경제 ($81B GDP). 농업 GDP의 6.4% GDP. 서비스업 GDP의 65.3%. 산림 지대 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong 민주주의 — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). ...할 때 soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks ...에 대한 중복 이익이 soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
에 보고: RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
를 통해 문서화: Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: 강화하다 soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: 채택하다 pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): 집행하다 mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: 강화하다 환경 assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) 을 요구하기 위해 enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur 환경 cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
을 추진: soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian 경제 ($115B GDP). 가스 지대 11.04% GDP. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). 농업 GDP의 18.3%. 제조업 GDP의 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. ...할 때 유전별 production and domestic consumption data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. ...할 때 domestic gas prices reflect market value, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 underpriced energy 약화된다.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: 에 보고: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
를 통해 문서화: international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish 유전별 production and 환경 data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): 채택하다 international 환경 standards for gold and uranium 광업
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: 이행하다 gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: 강화하다 환경 enforcement at 광업 and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to 환경 data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with 환경 data
를 통해 옹호: EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
을 추진: Aral Sea 환경 restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — 환경 regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold 광업.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — 환경 regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea 환경 disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent 경제 in crisis ($119.8B GDP — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and 제재. The 중복 이익 is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the 중복 이익 — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue 투명성 is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international 제재 monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
파괴 불가능. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly 배출-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
를 통해 문서화: exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international 제재 enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply 환경 standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility 환경 data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain 환경 standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain 제재 conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate 제재 policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting 투명성
Support international 제재 conditionality requiring democratic governance and 환경 standards
를 통해 옹호: Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
을 추진: PDVSA operational and 환경 투명성 as condition of 제재 relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to 시민 사회.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela 제재. EU — maintains 제재. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing 경제 ($476.4B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 24.4% GDP. 농업 GDP의 11.9%. 석탄 지대 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. 산림 지대 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the 중복 이익 away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. ...할 때 JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant 배출 and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: 에 보고: MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
를 통해 문서화: VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power 개발하다ment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): 에 투자하다 offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): 이행하다 PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: 강화하다 emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
를 통해 옹호: ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
을 추진: JETP 투명성 and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB 재생에너지 financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese 시민 사회 (within party framework). Note: independent 시민 사회 is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal 광업 company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power 개발하다ment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets 재생에너지 targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a 일당 국가 (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan 경제 ($11.2B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 12.6%. 석탄 지대 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. 농업 GDP의 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. EU 후보국 status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. ...할 때 환경 compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant 배출 and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: 에 보고: AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
를 통해 문서화: INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
에 투자하다 solar and wind capacity
이행하다 just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot 광업 communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): 개혁하다 tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): 집행하다 emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) 을 요구하기 위해 Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and 재생에너지 investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on 환경 standards
를 통해 옹호: Energy Community for just transition support
을 추진: World Bank and EBRD financing of 재생에너지 replacement
i: AMMK — 환경 protection agency. INDEP (Institute for 개발하다ment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, 국영, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — 에너지 규제기관. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan 경제 ($401.1B GDP). 석탄 지대 2.44% GDP. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). 제조업 GDP의 12.8%. 서비스업 GDP의 63%. Constitutional 민주주의. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. ...할 때 coal plant health costs are internalized, the 중복 이익 breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. ...할 때 renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant 배출, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate 배출.
a: 에 보고: DFFE (Department of Forestry, 수산업 and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
를 통해 문서화: Public Protector complaints
Eskom: 이행하다 coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): 개발하다 coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): 개혁하다 tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: 집행하다 Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) 을 요구하기 위해 Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
를 통해 옹호: BRICS for just energy transition principles
을 추진: climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African 환경 justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest 환경 law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal 광업. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal 광업. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.
NERSA — 에너지 규제기관. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional 민주주의, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African 경제 ($25.3B GDP). Mining 28.25% GDP — one of the highest 광업 dependencies globally (copper). 산림 지대 6.78%. 서비스업 GDP의 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper 광업 generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). ...할 때 광산별 환경 data is published, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: Mining royalty reform with 환경 earmarking. ...할 때 광업 revenue is partly allocated to 환경 remediation, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 externalizing pollution costs 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Copper smelting 배출 can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: 에 보고: ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
를 통해 문서화: community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through 광업 company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): 이행하다 international 환경 standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): 채택하다 enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state 광업 holding): Require 환경 compliance from partners
ZEMA: 집행하다 emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: 강화하다 환경 conditions in 광업 licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include 환경 data
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) 을 요구하기 위해 환경 enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with 환경 data
를 통해 옹호: SADC for regional 광업 환경 standards
을 추진: responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — 환경 management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals 개발하다ment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African 개발하다ment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African 경제 ($41.5B GDP). Mining 4.24% GDP (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). 농업 GDP의 8.7%. 제조업 GDP의 15.6%. 산림 지대 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's 광업 sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). ...할 때 광산별 환경 data is published alongside revenue, W가 계산 가능해진다.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). ...할 때 EU buyers require 환경 verification, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 unregulated extraction 약화된다.
Per-mine 환경 monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
부분적으로 파괴 가능. Lithium 광업 (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce 시스템 의존성.
a: 에 보고: EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
를 통해 문서화: ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international 광업 company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): 이행하다 international 환경 standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): 채택하다 responsible lithium 광업 practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned 환경 standards
Ministry of Mines: 집행하다 환경 conditions in 광업 licenses
EMA: 강화하다 환경 impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining 개발하다ment Corporation): Require 환경 compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available 의회 channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
를 통해 옹호: SADC Mining Protocol for regional 환경 standards
을 추진: EITI membership to improve 광업 투명성
i: EMA — 환경 management agency. ZELA — 환경 law organization. Note: 시민 사회 space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium 광업 (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining 개발하다ment. EMA — 환경 regulation. ZMDC — state 광업 company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest 경제 ($18,743.8B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 24.9% GDP — global factory floor. 석탄 지대 0.61%. 산업 GDP의 36.5%. 서비스업 GDP의 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more 재생에너지 annually than any other country. ...할 때 renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. ...할 때 existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the 중복 이익 breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant 배출 data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: 에 보고: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial 환경 protection bureaus
를 통해 문서화: 12369 환경 complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
에 투자하다 grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
를 통해 옹호: COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
을 추진: national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central 환경 당국. 12369 hotline — 환경 complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate 환경 data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All 국영, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National 개발하다ment and 개혁하다 Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a 일당 국가 — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced 경제 ($1,875.4B GDP). 제조업 GDP의 26.6% GDP (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). 서비스업 GDP의 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant 민주주의.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. ...할 때 carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the 중복 이익 breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. ...할 때 carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, ...에 대한 중복 이익이 coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant 배출 and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. W를 계산 가능하게 만든다.
파괴 불가능. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: 에 보고: Ministry of Environment (환경부)
를 통해 문서화: KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): 이행하다 coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: 강화하다 K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): 개혁하다 merit order to disadvantage coal
귀하의 대표에게 연락하십시오: 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) 을 요구하기 위해 coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
를 통해 옹호: OECD for coal finance phase-out
을 추진: G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — 환경 당국. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest 환경 NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national 배출). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
